caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering, and a gold watch sits in a black office chair within a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm and wears over-ear headphones. In the background, a white wall features a repeating logo consisting of five gold stars and the word "HUSTLE." A blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black container with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT". To the lower left, a small logo includes the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, leaning slightly forward toward the microphone; he is seen smiling and talking, with his facial expression shifting slightly as he speaks while looking toward someone off-screen.
